_comment: Recorded 2026-04-25 against a real mcp==1.2 server spawned over stdio. tools_list is the response of session.list_tools(); tool_calls maps 'name(args)' to the tool's first text-content output. Reproduce with MCP_LIVE=1 and the mcp package installed.

tools_list.name: calculator
tools_list.description: Evaluate a simple arithmetic expression like '2 + 3 * 4'.

tools_list.name: wiki_lookup
tools_list.description: Look up a short fact (capitals, authors, etc.).

tools_list.name: get_date
tools_list.description: Return the date for a relative spec (today, tomorrow, year, ...).
